import type { ChangeObject } from '../types.js'; type DmpOperation = 1 | 0 | -1; /** * converts a list of change objects to the format returned by Google's [diff-match-patch](https://github.com/google/diff-match-patch) library */ export declare function convertChangesToDMP<ValueT>(changes: ChangeObject<ValueT>[]): [DmpOperation, ValueT][]; export {}; //# sourceMappingURL=dmp.d.ts.map
